sector.indexDesc: Her sektorun kendine ozgu ihtiyaclari var. OnSuite, sektorunuze ozel yapilandirmalar ve hazir sablonlarla hizli devreye alim sunar.
sector.ctaDesc: Sektorunuze ozel 15 dakikalik demo ile OnSuite'in farkinizi gorun.
sector.indexCtaDesc: 15 dakikalik kisisellestirilmis demo ile tesisinize deger katacagimizi gorun.

refs.joinCta: Siz de Referanslarimiz Arasinda Yerinizi Alin

about.heroDesc: Siskon Otomasyon olarak 20+ yildir endustriyel otomasyon alaninda calisiyoruz. OnSuite, bu deneyimin yazilim urunune donusmesi.
about.talkDesc: Uretim hattinizi dijitallestirmek icin ilk adimi atin.
about.fieldExpDesc: Yazilimi ofiste degil, fabrika sahasinda gelistiriyoruz. Gercek problemleri gercek cozumlerle karsiliyor.
about.resultOrientedDesc: Teknoloji satmiyoruz, sonuc satiyoruz. OEE artisi, fire azalma, izlenebilirlik — olculebilir degerler.
about.longTermPartnerDesc: Musterilerimizle proje degil, ortaklik kuruyoruz. Devreye alimdan sonra da yaniinizdayiz.

timeline.title: Siskon Otomasyon Kurulusu
timeline.text: Izmir'de endustriyel otomasyon alaninda faaliyete basladik. PLC programlama, SCADA sistemleri ve saha otomasyonu ile uretim tesislerini dijitallestirmeye basladik.

timeline.title: MES Vizyonu
timeline.text: Sahada edindigimiz tecrube ile uretim yonetim sistemi (MES) gelistirmeye basladik. Fabrika verisini anlam ifade eden bilgiye donusturme hedefiyle yola ciktik.

timeline.title: OnSuite Platformu
timeline.text: Moduler, olceklenebilir ve bulut destekli OnSuite platformunu piyasaya sunduk. 8 modul ile uretimin her asamasini tek ekrandan yonetilebilir hale getirdik.

timeline.title: Global Buyume
timeline.text: 40+ ulkede, 100+ projede, 500+ uretim hattinda aktif kullanim. Bosch, BSH, Unilever, Philip Morris gibi global markalarla calisiyoruz.

home.automotiveDesc: Otomotiv tedarik zincirinde her parcayi hammaddeden montaja kadar takip edin. IATF 16949 uyumlulugu ve tam lot izlenebilirlik ile geri cagirma sureclerinizi dakikalardan saniyelere indirin.
home.foodDesc: FDA, BRC ve IFS standartlarina uyumlu uretim izleme. Sicaklik, nem ve proses parametrelerini gercek zamanli takip edin.
home.pharmaDesc: GMP ve FDA 21 CFR Part 11 uyumlu dijital kayit sistemi. Her urunu seri numarasindan gecmisine kadar tam izlenebilirlik.
home.tobaccoTitle: Tutun Sektorunde OPC UA TMC Uyumluluk
home.tobaccoDesc: TMC (Tobacco Machine Communication) standardina tam uyumlu veri toplama. Sigara makineleri ile dogrudan iletisim.
home.generalDesc: Sektorunuz ne olursa olsun, OnSuite modulerligiyle ihtiyaciniza ozel cozum sunulur. OEE, kalite, bakim ve raporlama tek platformda.
home.integrationDesc: OnSuite, kullandiginiz ERP ve otomasyon sistemleriyle sorunsuz entegre olur.
home.roiDesc: Sadece birkac parametre girin, tahmini kazaniminizi aninda gorun.
home.chatbotGreeting: Merhaba! OnSuite hakkinda ne ogrenmek istersiniz?

sector.indexDesc: Every industry has unique needs. OnSuite offers industry-specific configurations and ready-made templates for rapid deployment.
sector.ctaDesc: See the OnSuite difference with a 15-minute demo tailored to your industry.
sector.indexCtaDesc: See how we can add value to your facility with a personalized 15-minute demo.

refs.joinCta: Join Our Growing List of References
refs.joinCtaDesc: Meet your trusted solution partner in 40+ countries.

about.heroDesc: As Siskon Automation, we have been working in industrial automation for 20+ years. OnSuite is the transformation of this experience into a software product.
about.talkDesc: Take the first step to digitalize your production line.
about.fieldExpDesc: We develop software on the factory floor, not in the office. Real problems met with real solutions.
about.resultOrientedDesc: We don't sell technology, we sell results. OEE increase, waste reduction, traceability — measurable values.
about.longTermPartnerDesc: We build partnerships, not just projects. We stand by you even after deployment.

timeline.title: Siskon Automation Founded
timeline.text: Started operations in industrial automation in Izmir. Began digitalizing production facilities with PLC programming, SCADA systems, and field automation.

timeline.title: MES Vision
timeline.text: Leveraging our field experience, we began developing Manufacturing Execution Systems. Our goal: transforming factory data into meaningful information.

timeline.title: OnSuite Platform
timeline.text: Launched the modular, scalable, cloud-supported OnSuite platform. Made every stage of production manageable from a single screen with 8 modules.

timeline.title: Global Growth
timeline.text: Active in 40+ countries, 100+ projects, 500+ production lines. Working with global brands like Bosch, BSH, Unilever, Philip Morris.

home.automotiveDesc: Track every part from raw material to assembly in the automotive supply chain. Reduce recall processes from minutes to seconds with IATF 16949 compliance and full lot traceability.
home.foodDesc: Production monitoring compliant with FDA, BRC, and IFS standards. Track temperature, humidity, and process parameters in real time.
home.pharmaDesc: GMP and FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant digital record system. Full traceability for every product from serial number to history.
home.tobaccoTitle: OPC UA TMC Compliance in Tobacco
home.tobaccoDesc: Data collection fully compliant with TMC (Tobacco Machine Communication) standard. Direct communication with cigarette machines.
home.generalDesc: Whatever your industry, OnSuite's modularity offers custom solutions for your needs. OEE, quality, maintenance, and reporting in one platform.
home.integrationDesc: OnSuite integrates seamlessly with your ERP and automation systems.
home.roiDesc: Enter just a few parameters to see your estimated savings instantly.
home.chatbotGreeting: Hello! What would you like to learn about OnSuite?
